title: Brush Strokes
description: Sure hope it does? This mod allows for waxing blocks en masse, as well as tweaking Super Glue from Create.
body: ## Overview This mod adds Wax Brushes, which can be crafted from a Brush and some Honeycomb. They offer a helpful visual overlay when used to wax blocks, like Create's Super Glue. The mod also includes a built-in resource pack and datapack that tweaks Super Glue from Create, turning it into a Glue Brush that can be crafted from a Brush and some Slimeballs. ## License [![Code license (MIT)](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20license-MIT-green.svg?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/davigj/brushstrokes/blob/main/LICENSE.txt) Brush Strokes is available under the open source MIT License. Note that this means you are required to attribute the mod if you use any content from it in your own projects. ## Credits Feel free to direct any suggestions towards the [issue tracker](https://github.com/davidjjung/brushstrokes/issues)! This mod's features were originally implemented in [Raspberry Flavoured](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/raspberry-flavoured), via a truly mystifying pair of KubeJS scripts by [asof](https://modrinth.com/user/asof). The port to a standalone Forge 1.20.1 mod was done by [evanbones](https://modrinth.com/user/evanbones) and [DavigJ](https://modrinth.com/user/davigj). The original sprites for the Glue/Wax Brushes were done by [noelle](https://modrinth.com/user/noelledotjpg), with new vanilla-esque textures provided by [Kayla_the_Bee](https://modrinth.com/user/Kayla_the_Bee).
